movie.actors: Brooke Nevin, David Paetkau, Torrey DeVitto, Ben Easter
movie.plot: A group of teenagers in Colorado find themselves being stalked and killed one by one by a mysterious figure with a hook, exactly one year after they covered up a friend's accidental death.
movie.title: I'll Always Know What You Did Last Summer
movie.writer: Lois Duncan (based on characters created by), Michael D. Weiss
